case_title: YI ZHONG LIN VS. ELIZABETH CHAVEZ CUEVAS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,586.00 FILED BY LIN, YI ZHONG AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVAS, ELIZABETH CHAVEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVAS, ELIZABETH CHAVEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, YI ZHONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUEVAS, ELIZABETH CHAVEZ $2,825.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,935.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PERSONL INJURIES IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. THE JUDGMENT DETERMINES ISSUES PERTAINING TO PROPERTY DAMAGES ONLY. THE JUDGMENT IS BASED ON THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. TONY WONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PKAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
